'''dhachoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadiasker|kadiasker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadiasker|kadiasker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhachoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæcheyeth|dhæcheyeth]] || [[word:dhæcheyej|dhæcheyej]] || [[word:dhæcheyesh|dhæcheyesh]] || [[word:dhæcheye|dhæcheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhachochoyoth|dhachochoyoth]] || [[word:dhachochoyoj|dhachochoyoj]] || [[word:dhachochoyosh|dhachochoyosh]] || [[word:dhachochoyo|dhachochoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhachoyoth|dhachoyoth]] || [[word:dhachoyoj|dhachoyoj]] || [[word:dhachoyosh|dhachoyosh]] || [[word:dhachoyo|dhachoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhachofyoth|dhachofyoth]] || [[word:dhachofyoj|dhachofyoj]] || [[word:dhachofyosh|dhachofyosh]] || [[word:dhachofyof|dhachofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhachoyotho|dhachoyotho]] || [[word:dhachoyojo|dhachoyojo]] || [[word:dhachoyosho|dhachoyosho]] || [[word:dhachoyoko|dhachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhachoyoth|dhachoyoth]] || [[word:dhachoyoj|dhachoyoj]] || [[word:dhachoyosh|dhachoyosh]] || [[word:dhachoyo|dhachoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhachoyothol|dhachoyothol]] || [[word:dhachoyojol|dhachoyojol]] || [[word:dhachoyoshol|dhachoyoshol]] || [[word:dhachoyokol|dhachoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhachoyothotho|dhachoyothotho]] || [[word:dhachoyojojo|dhachoyojojo]] || [[word:dhachoyoshosho|dhachoyoshosho]] || [[word:dhachoyoko|dhachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhachoyothon|dhachoyothon]] || [[word:dhachoyojon|dhachoyojon]] || [[word:dhachoyoshon|dhachoyoshon]] || [[word:dhachoyokon|dhachoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhachoyothoro|dhachoyothoro]] || [[word:dhachoyojoro|dhachoyojoro]] || [[word:dhachoyoshoro|dhachoyoshoro]] || [[word:dhachoyokoro|dhachoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
